title: Wholesale One

buildability.reason: Uses only Shopify Admin API, Price Rules, Discount Codes, and Metafields; no custom platform needed, enabling a 3‑day MVP, 3‑week feature set, and 10‑week polish.

speedToRevenue.reason: App is self‑serve via Shopify App Store, subscription billing via Shopify Billing API, and can generate revenue in the first billing cycle.

wedge.reason: Flat €49/mo includes tiered pricing, tax‑exempt flags, MOQ, net‑30 invoice link, and B2B‑only catalog—one app, one price, 30‑minute CSV setup.

distribution.reason: Targets US DTC brands ($500K–$5M) reachable through the Shopify App Store and content marketing, covering the $50K–$2M TAM.

trapRisk.reason: No incumbent war, science‑project tech, or liability issues; the scope is narrow and well‑within a 3‑person team’s capacity.

expansion.reason: Provides a scalable B2B pricing engine that can grow from €10K to €1M by adding more tiers, advanced invoicing, and enterprise features without pivoting.

technicalSnapshot: The app leverages Shopify Admin API for product and price rule management, Metafields for B2B flags, Shopify Billing API for subscription, and optional Checkout API for net‑30 invoice links; it runs on a standard Node.js/React stack with App Bridge for UI integration.

v1Plan.day3: CSV import tool, basic tiered pricing rule creation, app store listing
v1Plan.week3: Add tax‑exempt flags, MOQ enforcement, B2B‑only catalog toggle, net‑30 invoice link integration
v1Plan.week10: Polish UI, performance, documentation, and subscription billing
